title: Readiness Audit, Prior-Skill Retrieval, and Evidence Baseline · Product Reasoning Brief: Artifact Triage
summary: A learner has many completed exercises but cannot show which behaviors are independently reproducible, current, accessible, secure, or useful. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp1 artifact triage increment in mastery baseline and project readiness ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
Map prior competencies to observable behaviors, dated artifacts, evidence strength, and unresolved gaps before selecting a product.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Artifact Triage · Theory Artifact Triage
steps.instruction:
theory case — A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Artifact Triage contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Artifact Triage · Theory Artifact Triage.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample. For Predict Artifact Triage · Theory Artifact Triage, keep Artifact Triage connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.text: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Artifact Triage while producing mastery baseline and project readiness ledger.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The worked example variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample. A defensible solution applies Artifact Triage, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to mastery baseline and project readiness ledger.

content.code:
# Worked focus: pp1-artifact-triage — Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
focus: pp1-artifact-triage
decision-evidence: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Anything committed to a repository is suitable portfolio evidence. This fails the Artifact Triage contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.

steps.title: Build Artifact Triage evidence · Theory Artifact Triage

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Artifact Triage structural check is only one gate. mastery baseline and project readiness ledger must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.title: Defend the Artifact Triage model · Theory Artifact Triage
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Artifact Triage: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A learner claims independent mastery from guided exercises, but a changed environment breaks the artifact and the evidence ledger has no dated reproduction. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Distinguish reusable evidence, practice residue, generated output, sensitive material, and unsupported claims in an existing work sample.
